title: Christmas Ribbon with Glitter Snowflakes, 6.3 cm x 10 Yards, Sheer Organza Wired Ribbon for Tree Decorations, Gift Wrapping, Wreath Making (Silver)
features: ENCHANTING SNOWFLAKE DESIGN : Our luxurious organza ribbon features delicate glitter snowflakes that shimmer under holiday lights, transforming your Christmas tree into a magical winter wonderland. The sheer gold fabric catches every glimmer, adding elegance and festive charm to your decor.

PERFECT 2.5-INCH WIDTH & 10-YARD LENGTH : Ideal for crafting wreath bows, tree toppers, gift wrapping, and more! The generous 10-yard spool ensures you have plenty of ribbon for all your DIY projects while staying neatly stored for future use.

PREMIUM WIRED ORGANZA FOR LASTING BEAUTY : Made from high-quality, tear-resistant organza with a lustrous finish, this ribbon won’t fray or wrinkle. The wired edges provide structure, making it easy to shape stunning bows and decorations that hold their form.

VERSATILE HOLIDAY & WEDDING DECOR : Perfect for stair railings, wreaths, gift baskets, floral arrangements, and wedding décor. Its elegant gold-and-white snowflake design enhances Christmas crafts, home accents, and festive party styling.

A MUST-HAVE FOR FESTIVE CRAFTING : Whether you're wrapping gifts or decorating your tree, this glittered wired ribbon adds a touch of sophistication. Its stunning design and durable quality make it the best choice for elevating your holiday creations!
description: Transform your holiday decorating with this enchanting TopiaChristmas wired ribbon featuring delicate glitter snowflakes on sheer organza material. Measuring 6.3 centimetres in width and spanning a generous 10 yards in length, this versatile ribbon adds a touch of winter magic to your festive creations. The wired edges provide excellent shape control, making it perfect for crafting stunning Christmas tree decorations, elegant gift wrapping, and eye-catching wreaths. The translucent organza base allows light to filter through beautifully, while the sparkling snowflake pattern creates a magical winter wonderland effect. Whether you're creating professional-looking bows, enhancing your holiday décor, or adding finishing touches to DIY craft projects, this ribbon's premium quality and ethereal design make it an essential addition to your Christmas decorating supplies. The substantial length ensures you have plenty of material for multiple projects throughout the festive season.
